name: St.Germain's Turf and Sims
about: St.Germain's Turf and Sims specializes in the design and installation of custom golf simulators and artificial turf solutions for both commercial and residential clients. They serve the New England area, offering comprehensive services that include creating indoor golf simulator rooms, home golf simulators, and various turf installations such as putting greens, pool areas, and dog parks. The company focuses on transforming client spaces with high-end finishes and technology to enhance the golfing experience. Founded in 2015, St.Germain's began as a property maintenance company before specializing in turf installation and later expanding into custom golf simulators, with the owner continuously participating in industry training to stay current with products and techniques.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-built golf simulator rooms tailored to individual spaces
Premium technology with detailed game improvement analysis
Access to hundreds of world-renowned golf course simulations
Expert installation and design services for both residential and commercial use

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, clients typically need to provide their own golf clubs for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink service is mentioned, but BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator sessions can be customized to project needs.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they service families and have experience with residential installations that can accommodate family use.
